title: Mobile user registered on Lens tenant, mobile app data correct
scenario: Verify that a mobile user registered on a Lens tenant sees correct tenant data (app version, tenant name, tenant id, user id, app id, last connection date) in the mobile app.
steps: Open the Poly Support mobile app on the registered device.
Log in using the credentials of a mobile user registered on a Lens tenant.
Navigate to the account or settings section where tenant information is displayed.
Locate and review the displayed tenant data fields.
Verify that the following fields are present and correctly populated: app version, tenant name, tenant id, user id, app id, and last connection date.
expected: The mobile app displays all required tenant data fields (app version, tenant name, tenant id, user id, app id, and last connection date) correctly for the registered Lens tenant user.
